case_title: 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY VS. CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO ELLIS-O'FARRELL PARKING CORP et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-18-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO ELLIS-O'FARRELL PARKING CORP ORATION DOES 1 TO V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-07-2011 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-05-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-22-2011

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-07-2011 CONTINUED TO NOV-18-2011 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
